name: Dillard Williams
description:
Dillard’s had an interesting life, a rags to riches story about a lazy, overweight bum falling in love with Rugby after his father dragged him to a small community Rugby club at the age of 22. From then on the dragon became one of the most prolific rugby players in the world. That is until a career-ending injury sent him packing.

That was twenty years, and now the dragon has secluded away from the public eye and eats his sorrows away. The once athletic dragon is now bigger than he ever was in his younger days and, no longer cares about what he’s doing to his health.

As always, please leave a review, suggestion or comment below.

Tags: Fat Fur, Dragon, Slob, Ex-Jock, Weight Gain, Furry, DILF,
creator: corkboarf
